name: Artifact Eater
description: If you exit the dungeon, roll 2 dice: 2-5) Discard one of your other loot cards at random. 6-12) This card has a gold value equal to the result of your roll multiplied by 100.

name: Flying Carpet
description: Gold value: 500. When you resolve a Bridge or Bottomless Pit chamber, you may discard this card to automatically succeed at your skill test.

name: Quicksilver Potion
description: Gold value: 1,500. You may discard this card at the start of your turn to take 3 turns in a row before the next player takes his turn.

name: Harp of Tranquility
description: Gold value: 2,000. While you have this card, you must draw 2 dragon cards each time you draw a dragon card. You may discard this card at the start of any turn.

name: Sun Spear
description: Gold value: 1,100. If you also have the Staff of Light, this card has a gold value of 2,500.

name: Forbidden Tome
description: When you start your turn in the treasure chamber, roll 2 dice: 2-3) You die. 4-5) Roll 1 die and suffer a number of wounds equal to the result. 6-8) End your turn. 9-11) Draw 4 treasure cards. Keep 2 and discard the other 2. 12) Draw 3 treasure cards and then immediately exit the dungeon.

name: Staff of Light
description: Gold value: 700. If you have this card and the Sun Spear, this card has a gold value of 2,500.
